fixes.origin:
if opts.min_amount:
    sql += "AND p.amount >= {min_amount} ".format(min_amount=opts.min_amount)

sql += "ORDER BY p.created_at DESC"
return sql, params
fixes.replacement:
if opts.min_amount:
    sql += "AND p.amount >= %s "
    params.append(int(opts.min_amount))

sql += "ORDER BY p.created_at DESC"
return sql, params
